generated_oml:
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework for automated DT artifact generation from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringAndControlService, DeviceModelingAndControlLogicService, PredictiveAnalyticsAndOptimizationService, InteractiveVisualizationService, ModularExtensibilityService
]

instance RealTimeDataExchange : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities for physical-digital synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringAndControlService, PredictiveAnalyticsAndOptimizationService
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInterfaces : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization interfaces for monitoring and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points for integrating custom analytics services"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModularExtensibilityService
]

instance TwinLightDevelopmentEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development environment supported by TwinLight (Grant 898708)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringAndControlService, DeviceModelingAndControlLogicService, PredictiveAnalyticsAndOptimizationService, InteractiveVisualizationService, ModularExtensibilityService
]

instance BOREALISDevelopmentEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development environment supported by BOREALIS (Grant 910225)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringAndControlService, DeviceModelingAndControlLogicService, PredictiveAnalyticsAndOptimizationService, InteractiveVisualizationService, ModularExtensibilityService
]

instance EclipseDittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto middleware for bidirectional data exchange with policy-based validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringAndControlService, DeviceModelingAndControlLogicService
]

instance HonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hono middleware for bidirectional data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringAndControlService
]

instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric BIM representation enriched with semantic device metadata (sensors, actuators, controllers) defined within the BIM environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework, EclipseDittoMiddleware, HonoMiddleware
]

instance StructuredDTArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured DT artifacts generated from enriched BIM models via Model-Driven Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataExchange, InteractiveVisualizationInterfaces
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringAndControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and control of building operations for Facility Managers"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, ControlCommandAction
]

instance DeviceModelingAndControlLogicService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Device modeling and control logic configuration for Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceModelingInsight, ControlLogicConfigurationAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsAndOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics and optimization services for decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for immersive system oversight"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance ModularExtensibilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular extensibility via custom services and plugins developed by DT Engineers to enhance functionality according to evolving operational needs"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceExtensionAction
]

    base:desc "Real-time operational status insights for facility management"
]

    base:desc "Predictive insights for building operations optimization"
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization of building system status"
]

instance DeviceModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Device modeling insights for control logic configuration"
]

    base:desc "Control commands for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ControlLogicConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Configuration of control logic for building devices"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CustomServiceExtensionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Custom service integration for evolving operational needs"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator with photometric parameters (brightness, color temperature in Kelvin) derived from BIM metadata"
]

    base:desc "Virtual controller using UE5 Delegates and Observable pattern for brokering control commands to physical actuators"
]

    base:desc "Custom behavior component processing Revit photometric values for lighting control in UE5"
]

    base:desc "Extension point for parsing BIM features into DT artifacts"
]

instance DittoDevice : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles device addressing for physical actuators via Eclipse Ditto"
]

    base:desc "Manages connections for physical devices via Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain"
    base:contains LightingSystemActuator, UnrealTwinController, TwinComponent, FeatureParser, DittoDevice, DittoConnection
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT Framework acts as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange between roles such as Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers, utilizing a modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration to enable holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling and control logic configuration by Building Control Engineers using BIM, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate structured representations and deployable artifacts. Runtime operations include real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization for Facility Managers, while DT Engineers extend functionality through custom services via standardized extension points."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity and data integrity are maintained through Eclipse Ditto's policy-based validation of sensor data ranges and units, alongside pre-execution checks for actuator commands. Fault tolerance is ensured by Eclipse Hono's at-least-once message delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage, mitigating data loss during network disruptions. These mechanisms collectively ensure synchronization and operational safety between physical assets and their digital twins."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems through standardized extension points for service integration, scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems, and maintainability via low-overhead updates."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework leverages Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for device modeling and semantic foundation creation, addressing BIM's static representation limitations for dynamic DTs. Specific compliance with additional standards or interoperability protocols is not elaborated in the documents."
]
